videoSnippet.title: The Actual Game Between Magnus Carlsen and Vasyl Ivanchuk | FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2832) - Ivanchuk, Vasyl (2622)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.06.17

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 g6 3.Nc3 d5 4.cxd5 Nxd5 5.e4 Nxc3 6.bxc3 Bg7 7.Bb5+ c6 8.Ba4 O-O 9.Ne2 c5 10.O-O Nc6 11.Be3 Na5 12.Bb5 b6 13.Rc1 cxd4 14.cxd4 e6 15.Qd2 Bb7 16.f3 Qd6 17.h4 Rfc8 18.h5 Bf8 19.h6 Qb4 20.Qxb4 Bxb4 21.Nf4 Ba3 22.Rxc8+ Rxc8 23.Rd1 Bf8 24.d5 e5 25.Nd3 Bd6 26.f4 exf4 27.Bxf4 Bxf4 28.Nxf4 a6 29.Be2 Kf8 30.e5 Nc4 31.Bxc4 Rxc4 32.d6 Bc6 33.Nh3 Ke8 34.Ng5 Rc2 35.Nxh7 Rxg2+ 36.Kf1 Rh2 37.Nf6+ Kf8 38.h7 Kg7 39.Rd4
